name: Empire PowerShell UAC Bypass Detected
description: Detects PowerShell commands with specific parameters used by the Empire post-exploitation framework to bypass User Account Control (UAC). This rule identifies command-line patterns that attempt to exploit vulnerabilities or misconfigurations in Windows Update to elevate privileges.

prompts.prompt: Empire PowerShell UAC Bypass attempt detected, possibly exploiting Windows Update. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Command** {command}. Investigate this high-risk activity immediately for unauthorized privilege escalation.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Process Creation (e.g., 1).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line, containing UAC bypass patterns.
